hyperedges.label: React Best-Practices Section Taxonomy (8 impact-ranked categories)
useEffectEvent stable-callback pattern (avoid effect re-runs / re-subscriptions)
Bundle deferral & dynamic loading pattern (lazy-load + preload heavy modules)
Concurrent React Rendering APIs for Non-Blocking UI
Toad Telegram Verification & JWT Auth Flow
Toad backend REST API endpoint set
Polling-driven fill detection and reverse order flow

useEffectEvent stable-callback pattern (avoid effect re-runs / re-subscriptions)
